status_code.description: Job status lookup code (stable, for UI badges)

recipient_email.description: Primary email recipient address for email jobs

recipient_user_id.description: Linked user id of the primary recipient, null for external addresses

recipient_is_external.description: Whether the primary recipient is an external address with no SelfHelp user

delivery_policy.description: Delivery policy of the primary recipient (respect_user_preferences or required_system)

date_scheduled.description: Date when job should be executed (adjusted to CMS timezone)

date_created.description: Date when job was created (adjusted to CMS timezone)

date_to_be_executed.description: Date when job should be executed (adjusted to CMS timezone)

date_executed.description: Date when job was actually executed (adjusted to CMS timezone)

email_subject.description: Resolved email subject for email jobs

schedule.description: Timezone-aware schedule intent for the job

timezone.description: Timezone the execution time was calculated in

local_datetime.description: Intended local (wall-clock) execution time in the job timezone

is_wall_clock.description: True when the schedule is wall-clock (recalculated on user timezone change); false for relative/absolute schedules
